caption: Fig. 1. IXP from the student perspective, displaying recent injects.
description2: The figure displays a graphical representation of an individual's experience points (IXP) from their own perspective, highlighting recent injects.
description3: Two-panel screenshot displays a user interface with a disclaimer and context sections, alongside options, notifications, and exercise information.
questions: What type of activity is being presented to the student?

caption: Fig. 2. Top ten features in the fully specified model (Text+Log+Bloom). Positive weights indicate higher predicted probability of milestone achievement. Subscripts for embedding-based features represent the n-th dimension of the vector.
description2: The figure plots the top ten features in a fully specified model, with positive weights indicating higher predicted probability of milestone achievement.
description3: A bar chart displays the top ten features and their logistic regression coefficients, with positive values indicating higher milestone probability.
questions: What features influence the predicted probability of achievement?
How do the features represent different dimensions of the model?
